steps.title: Identify what Edwards is known for
steps.content: The word “esteemed” shows his portrait-painting is highly valued and characteristic of his work.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Reputation for” means being known for or distinguished by something — exactly what the passage establishes about Edwards and his portrait-painting.
The other choices either contradict the esteem shown for the work (complaint), introduce unfounded uncertainty (question), or describe necessity rather than reputation (requirement).
That matches choice B — B is correct.
